faqs.question: How much does clothes moth control cost in Kingsbridge?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control services in Kingsbridge range from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How can I tell if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Kingsbridge home?
faqs.answer: Signs include small irregular holes in wool clothing or fabrics, silken tubes or cases in closets, small beige or gold-colored moths flying near wardrobes, and larvae (small white caterpillars) in fabric folds. You may also notice damaged carpets, upholstery, or stored blankets, especially in darker, undisturbed areas.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our trained technicians. We'll provide specific instructions for preparation and re-entry times, and can discuss low-toxicity or heat treatment options for sensitive households in Kingsbridge.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a clothes moth problem in Kingsbridge?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Kingsbridge and the Bronx for urgent pest situations. Our team can typically schedule an inspection within 24-48 hours and begin treatment immediately upon confirmation, helping you protect your valuable fabrics before more damage occurs.
